proposal_summary: Revoke the DAO's ability to upgrade the name wrapper by setting a new proxy-based metadata service address and then revoking admin ownership of the name wrapper.

disclosed_entities.name: New Metadata Service (Implementation)
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: A new metadata service has been deployed at 0x806f84F3789f51352C1B0aB3fFa192665d283808

disclosed_entities.name: Metadata Proxy
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: a transparent proxy was deployed in transaction... at address 0xabb76d7e79de010117b147761013f11630a6799f

disclosed_entities.name: Proxy Admin
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: The admin contract for this proxy is at 0xeae9309ddb1aadb4cf1ebad5e51aef999833a992

disclosed_entities.name: wallet.ensdao.eth
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: and the owner set to wallet.ensdao.eth

disclosed_entities.name: Name Wrapper
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Admin control over the name wrapper gives the DAO two functions

disclosed_addresses.textual_evidence: A new metadata service has been deployed at 0x806f84F3789f51352C1B0aB3fFa192665d283808
transparent proxy was deployed... at address 0xabb76d7e79de010117b147761013f11630a6799f
The admin contract for this proxy is at 0xeae9309ddb1aadb4cf1ebad5e51aef999833a992

claimed_actions.raw_action: sets the metadata service address on the name wrapper to the above proxy
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Updates the Name Wrapper to use the newly deployed metadata proxy.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: The executable component of this proposal sets the metadata service address on the name wrapper to the above proxy

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Removes the DAO's administrative control over the Name Wrapper, preventing future upgrades.

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal performs two straightforward actions: updating an address parameter and revoking admin ownership.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: The executable component of this proposal sets the metadata service address on the name wrapper to the above proxy, then revokes ownership over it.

limitations: No explicit contract addresses were provided for the existing Name Wrapper contract.
Exact function signature names for setting the metadata address or revoking ownership were not disclosed in the text.
